description: R-layer: fact stored, 10 noise events injected, assert_query still retrieves it.

steps.content: My favourite drink is matcha latte with oat milk, no sugar.
The weather in Amsterdam is cloudy today.
Python 3.13 was released with some performance improvements.
The team meeting is scheduled for Friday at 10am.
I enjoy jazz music in the evenings.
Remote work is more productive for deep focus tasks.
I went for a walk in the park this morning.
My cat knocked over a glass of water again.
The new laptop has great battery life.
I finished reading a book on stoic philosophy.
Dinner tonight was homemade pasta with tomato sauce.

steps.query: favourite drink matcha latte oat milk
